style_effects: Subtle heat haze drifts from Snorlax's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion around its body, catching the cold luminescence of its aura, which shimmers with intense cobalt intensity in a tight, geometric halo. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
